creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
Which versions of FreeBSD is this on? 14.something by the osrel.
And which version of Valgrind? 3.22 from pkg?

I think I see the problem. Copy and paste error from 'sysctl'.

I'll add your testcase to the regression tests if that's OK with you (it should be based on the license).

I'll try to fix this tonight so it can get into the release of Valgrind 3.23.
